recipes.name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
ingredients: 5 C flour (we like 3 C white and 2 C whole wheat)
instructions: Cream the butter and sugar together, then beat in the eggs and vanilla
Mix in salt, soda and flour

recipes.name: Pancakes
instructions: In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, salt and sugar.
Make a well in the center and pour in the milk, egg and melted butter; mix until smooth.
Heat a lightly oiled griddle or frying pan over medium high heat. Pour or scoop the batter onto the griddle, using approximately 1/4 cup for each pancake. Brown on both sides and serve hot.
